query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN aiSummary IS NOT NULL AND aiSummary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN aiSummary IS NULL OR aiSummary = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usp IS NOT NULL AND usp != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_usp,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priceTier IS NOT NULL AND priceTier != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price_tier,
  SUM(CASE WHEN notSuitableFor IS NOT NULL AND notSuitableFor != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_not_suitable,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publicWebsite IS NOT NULL AND publicWebsite != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_website,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN aiEnrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_enriched_at
FROM suppliers WHERE isActive = 1;
